title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF INAWANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DULAG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF KAMITOK.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5224 / 53 OG No. 16, 5139 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1698, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF INAWANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DULAG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF KAMITOK.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Inawangan, Municipality of Dulag, Province of Leyte, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Kamitok.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
